name: Enrique Jorrín
abstract: Enrique Jorrín (December 25, 1926 – December 12, 1987) was a Cuban charanga violinist, composer and music director. He is considered the inventor of the cha-cha-chá, a popular style of ballroom music derived from danzón.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Palmieri
about_quotes.evidence: Orquesta America—they are credited for the first cha cha cha, by a gentleman called Enrique Jorrin.
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Palmieri — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
